requirement_topic.en: KC Mark — mandatory under ECPSA (Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act)
requirement_topic.zh: KC标志 — ECPSA强制要求（《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》）
requirement_topic.zht: KC標誌 — ECPSA強制要求（《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》）

summary.en: The KC (Korea Certification) Mark is mandatory under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (ECPSA, 전기용품및생활용품안전관리법) for electrical appliances and products listed in the mandatory product scope, which includes industrial AC motors within ECPSA's coverage categories. The KC Mark is administered by KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) under MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy). Products must pass safety testing to applicable KS C standards, undergo conformity assessment by a designated certification body, and display the KC Mark before being imported or placed on the market in South Korea. The mark covers electrical safety; EMC is covered separately by KC Radio under MSIT.
summary.zh: KC（韩国认证）标志依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（ECPSA）对强制产品范围内的电气用品和产品为强制要求，包括ECPSA覆盖类别内的工业交流电机。KC标志由MOTIE（贸易、工业和能源部）下属的KATS（韩国技术和标准机构）管理。产品须通过适用KS C标准的安全测试，经指定认证机构合格评定，并在进口或投放韩国市场前标注KC标志。该标志涵盖电气安全；EMC由MSIT下属的KC无线电单独涵盖。
summary.zht: KC（韓國認證）標誌依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（ECPSA）對強制產品範圍內的電氣用品和產品為強制要求，包括ECPSA覆蓋類別內的工業交流電機。KC標誌由MOTIE（貿易、工業和能源部）下屬的KATS（韓國技術和標準機構）管理。產品須通過適用KS C標準的安全測試，經指定認證機構合格評定，並在進口或投放韓國市場前標注KC標誌。該標誌涵蓋電氣安全；EMC由MSIT下屬的KC無線電單獨涵蓋。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (ECPSA, 전기용품및생활용품안전관리법)
KS C IEC 60034-1 (rating and performance, adopted)
KS C IEC 60034 series (safety and performance standards)
KATS / MOTIE KC Mark certification procedures

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for electrical products listed in the CCC mandatory catalogue. For industrial motors, CCC applies to motors within the scope of the compulsory certification catalogue (generally low-voltage motors covered by applicable GB standards). CCC is administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration) and testing is performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories. CCC does not substitute for South Korea's KC Mark.
summary.zh: 中国对CCC强制认证目录中的电气产品要求CCC（中国强制认证）。对工业电机而言，CCC适用于强制认证目录范围内的电机（通常为适用GB标准涵盖的低压电机）。CCC由国家认证认可监督管理委员会管理，测试由CNAS认可实验室进行。CCC不能替代韩国KC标志。
summary.zht: 中國對CCC強制認證目錄中的電氣產品要求CCC（中國強制認證）。對工業電機而言，CCC適用於強制認證目錄範圍內的電機（通常為適用GB標準涵蓋的低壓電機）。CCC由國家認證認可監督管理委員會管理，測試由CNAS認可實驗室進行。CCC不能替代韓國KC標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for listed products
GB 4706 / applicable GB safety standards for motors in CCC scope

gap.en: CCC certification held by a Chinese motor does not grant KC Mark recognition or exemption in South Korea. The two certification systems are independent. Motors exported from China to South Korea must undergo separate KC Mark conformity assessment to KS C standards, including 60 Hz rated condition testing. Market surveillance by KATS and Customs enforcement apply to uncertified imports.
gap.zh: 中国电机持有的CCC认证不能在韩国获得KC标志认可或豁免。两套认证体系相互独立。从中国出口至韩国的电机须按KS C标准另行进行KC标志合格评定，包括在60 Hz额定条件下的测试。KATS市场监管和海关执法适用于未经认证的进口产品。
gap.zht: 中國電機持有的CCC認證不能在韓國獲得KC標誌認可或豁免。兩套認證體系相互獨立。從中國出口至韓國的電機須按KS C標準另行進行KC標誌合格評定，包括在60 Hz額定條件下的測試。KATS市場監管和海關執法適用於未經認證的進口產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — motors in ECPSA scope cannot be imported or sold in South Korea without KC Mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for motors in CCC mandatory catalogue; separate from KC Mark requirements

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with CCC certification cannot enter the South Korea market without separately obtaining the KC Mark under ECPSA. KC Mark assessment must be conducted at 60 Hz rated conditions. Importing or selling uncertified motors in South Korea may result in market surveillance action, product recall, or customs seizure. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有CCC认证的中国电机，未单独取得ECPSA下的KC标志，不得进入韩国市场。KC标志评定须在60 Hz额定条件下进行。在韩国进口或销售未经认证的电机，可能导致市场监管行动、产品召回或海关扣押。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有CCC認證的中國電機，未單獨取得ECPSA下的KC標誌，不得進入韓國市場。KC標誌評定須在60 Hz額定條件下進行。在韓國進口或銷售未經認證的電機，可能導致市場監管行動、產品召回或海關扣押。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Labelling and Nameplate Requirements — KS C / ECPSA
requirement_topic.zh: 标签和铭牌要求 — KS C / ECPSA
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤和銘牌要求 — KS C / ECPSA

summary.en: Under ECPSA and KS C IEC 60034-1, motors placed on the South Korea market must display: KC Mark, rated voltage (380 V / 220 V as applicable), rated frequency (60 Hz), rated power (kW), rated speed (rpm at 60 Hz), efficiency class (IE grade per KS C IEC 60034-30-1), manufacturer identification, and model number. Korean-language labelling may be required for consumer-facing documentation. Nameplate data must reflect 60 Hz rated conditions, not 50 Hz Chinese factory nameplates.
summary.zh: 根据ECPSA和KS C IEC 60034-1，投放韩国市场的电机须标注：KC标志、额定电压（380 V / 220 V，视情况而定）、额定频率（60 Hz）、额定功率（kW）、额定转速（60 Hz下rpm）、效率等级（按KS C IEC 60034-30-1的IE等级）、制造商标识和型号。消费者面向文件可能需要韩语标注。铭牌数据须反映60 Hz额定条件，而非50 Hz中国工厂铭牌。
summary.zht: 根據ECPSA和KS C IEC 60034-1，投放韓國市場的電機須標注：KC標誌、額定電壓（380 V / 220 V，視情況而定）、額定頻率（60 Hz）、額定功率（kW）、額定轉速（60 Hz下rpm）、效率等級（按KS C IEC 60034-30-1的IE等級）、製造商標識和型號。消費者面向文件可能需要韓語標注。銘牌數據須反映60 Hz額定條件，而非50 Hz中國工廠銘牌。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-30-1 (IE efficiency class on nameplate)

summary.en: Under GB 18613-2020 and GB/T 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1), Chinese motors must display: CCC mark (if in scope), rated voltage, rated frequency (50 Hz), rated power, rated speed at 50 Hz, efficiency grade (IE class per GB 18613-2020), manufacturer name, and product model. All Chinese nameplate data reflects 50 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 根据GB 18613-2020和GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1），中国电机须标注：CCC标志（适用时）、额定电压、额定频率（50 Hz）、额定功率、50 Hz下额定转速、效率等级（按GB 18613-2020的IE等级）、制造商名称和产品型号。所有中国铭牌数据均反映50 Hz运行条件。
summary.zht: 根據GB 18613-2020和GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1），中國電機須標注：CCC標誌（適用時）、額定電壓、額定頻率（50 Hz）、額定功率、50 Hz下額定轉速、效率等級（按GB 18613-2020的IE等級）、製造商名稱和產品型號。所有中國銘牌數據均反映50 Hz運行條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 755-2019 (equivalent IEC 60034-1, nameplate requirements at 50 Hz)

gap.en: Chinese factory nameplates show 50 Hz rated data (speed, efficiency, power factor) which cannot be used unchanged for South Korea market labelling. South Korea-specific nameplates must show 60 Hz rated values. KC Mark display is mandatory. Efficiency class must be verified and stated at 60 Hz. Replacing or relabelling motors with South Korea-compliant nameplates requires re-testing at 60 Hz.
gap.zh: 中国工厂铭牌显示50 Hz额定数据（转速、效率、功率因数），不能直接用于韩国市场标签。针对韩国市场的铭牌须显示60 Hz额定值。KC标志标注为强制要求。效率等级须在60 Hz下核验并标注。更换或重新标注符合韩国规定的铭牌，须在60 Hz下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國工廠銘牌顯示50 Hz額定數據（轉速、效率、功率因數），不能直接用於韓國市場標籤。針對韓國市場的銘牌須顯示60 Hz額定值。KC標誌標注為強制要求。效率等級須在60 Hz下核驗並標注。更換或重新標注符合韓國規定的銘牌，須在60 Hz下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Mark display and 60 Hz nameplate data required under ECPSA for market access
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 755 nameplate requirements at 50 Hz; CCC mark display if in CCC catalogue scope

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor nameplates rated at 50 Hz do not comply with South Korea's ECPSA labelling requirements for a 60 Hz market. Motors must be re-tested at 60 Hz, KC Mark obtained, and South Korea-specific nameplates applied before import or market placement. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 以50 Hz额定的中国电机铭牌不符合韩国ECPSA对60 Hz市场的标签要求。电机须在60 Hz下重新测试、取得KC标志，并在进口或投放市场前更换韩国专用铭牌。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 以50 Hz額定的中國電機銘牌不符合韓國ECPSA對60 Hz市場的標籤要求。電機須在60 Hz下重新測試、取得KC標誌，並在進口或投放市場前更換韓國專用銘牌。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Market Surveillance and Import Enforcement — KATS / Customs
requirement_topic.zh: 市场监管和进口执法 — KATS / 海关
requirement_topic.zht: 市場監管和進口執法 — KATS / 海關

summary.en: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) under MOTIE conducts market surveillance for ECPSA-covered products. Korean Customs enforces KC Mark requirements at import. Motors without KC Mark may be seized at customs or ordered recalled from the market. KATS may conduct post-market sampling tests; non-compliant motors face sales prohibition, mandatory recall, and possible penalties. Importers bear the conformity obligation for motors they bring into South Korea.
summary.zh: MOTIE下属的KATS（韩国技术和标准机构）对ECPSA涵盖产品开展市场监管。韩国海关在进口环节执行KC标志要求。无KC标志的电机可能在海关被扣押或被责令从市场召回。KATS可开展上市后抽样测试；不合规电机面临销售禁止、强制召回和可能的处罚。进口商对其进口至韩国的电机承担合规义务。
summary.zht: MOTIE下屬的KATS（韓國技術和標準機構）對ECPSA涵蓋產品開展市場監管。韓國海關在進口環節執行KC標誌要求。無KC標誌的電機可能在海關被扣押或被責令從市場召回。KATS可開展上市後抽樣測試；不合規電機面臨銷售禁止、強制召回和可能的處罰。進口商對其進口至韓國的電機承擔合規義務。

standards_or_laws: Korean Customs Law (import KC Mark enforcement)
KATS market surveillance procedures under MOTIE

summary.en: In China, SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation) and CIQ (China Inspection and Quarantine) enforce CCC certification requirements at import and in market surveillance. CCC-listed products without a valid CCC certificate may be seized at customs. SAMR conducts periodic spot-check campaigns. The enforcement structure differs from South Korea's KATS/Customs system; Chinese CCC enforcement experience does not transfer to South Korea.
summary.zh: 在中国，市场监管总局（SAMR）和中国检验检疫局（CIQ）在进口环节和市场监管中执行CCC认证要求。无有效CCC证书的CCC目录产品可能在海关被扣押。SAMR定期开展抽查行动。执法结构与韩国KATS/海关体系不同；中国CCC执法经验不适用于韩国。
summary.zht: 在中國，市場監管總局（SAMR）和中國檢驗檢疫局（CIQ）在進口環節和市場監管中執行CCC認證要求。無有效CCC證書的CCC目錄產品可能在海關被扣押。SAMR定期開展抽查行動。執法結構與韓國KATS/海關體系不同；中國CCC執法經驗不適用於韓國。

standards_or_laws: CCC enforcement by SAMR and CIQ
Chinese Customs Law (CCC enforcement at import)

gap.en: South Korea's KC Mark enforcement is independent of China's CCC system. Exporters must ensure KC Mark is obtained before shipment. Korean Customs may reject uncertified shipments. KATS post-market surveillance may trigger recalls. Importers (not just exporters) bear legal responsibility in South Korea. CCC compliance history in China provides no exemption or mitigation under South Korean law.
gap.zh: 韩国KC标志执法独立于中国CCC体系。出口商须确保在出货前取得KC标志。韩国海关可拒绝未经认证的货物入境。KATS上市后监管可能触发召回。在韩国，进口商（不仅是出口商）承担法律责任。中国的CCC合规记录在韩国法律下不提供任何豁免或减轻处理。
gap.zht: 韓國KC標誌執法獨立於中國CCC體系。出口商須確保在出貨前取得KC標誌。韓國海關可拒絕未經認證的貨物入境。KATS上市後監管可能觸發召回。在韓國，進口商（不僅是出口商）承擔法律責任。中國的CCC合規記錄在韓國法律下不提供任何豁免或減輕處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Mark required before import; market surveillance and customs enforcement active
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC enforcement by SAMR/CIQ at import and in market; independent of South Korea KC requirements

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Exporting motors from China to South Korea without a valid KC Mark creates import seizure risk, sales prohibition, and mandatory recall exposure. CCC certification provides no exemption in South Korea. Importers in South Korea bear independent legal liability. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在未持有有效KC标志的情况下从中国向韩国出口电机，面临进口扣押、销售禁止和强制召回风险。CCC认证在韩国不提供任何豁免。韩国进口商承担独立法律责任。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在未持有有效KC標誌的情況下從中國向韓國出口電機，面臨進口扣押、銷售禁止和強制召回風險。CCC認證在韓國不提供任何豁免。韓國進口商承擔獨立法律責任。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
